metrics.label: Tasks Closed / Developer
metrics.sublabel: Jira · closed issues · per developer · period total

metrics.label: Task Development Time
metrics.sublabel: Jira · time in dev statuses · per-task median · lower = better

metrics.label: Task Reopen Rate
metrics.sublabel: Jira · reopen events ÷ closures (this period) · lower = better

metrics.label: Due Date Compliance
metrics.sublabel: Jira · tasks closed by due date

metrics.label: Estimation Accuracy
metrics.sublabel: Jira · how close estimate matches actual time

metrics.label: Worklog Logging Accuracy
metrics.sublabel: Jira · worklog logged ÷ time in dev statuses · 100 = on target · requires both

metrics.label: Bugs / Tasks Closed
metrics.sublabel: Jira · bug-type issues ÷ total closed · lower = better

metrics.label: Mean Time to Resolution
metrics.sublabel: Jira · close − create · lower = better

metrics.label: Stale In-Progress
metrics.sublabel: Jira · open issues untouched > 14 days · snapshot, as of today

metrics.label: Flow Efficiency
metrics.sublabel: Jira · time in dev statuses ÷ lifetime · per-task median · higher = better

metrics.label: Pickup Time
metrics.sublabel: Jira · created → first dev status · per-task median · lower = better

metrics.label: Commits Authored
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · commits authored · period total · excl. merge commits

metrics.label: Pull Requests Created
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · PRs authored · period total

metrics.label: Pull Requests Merged
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · authored and merged · period total
metrics.description: Pull requests authored and merged. Source not ingested yet — cell shows ComingSoon until Bitbucket PR ingestion lands.

metrics.label: Clean LOC
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · lines added · excl. spec/config · period total

metrics.label: Pull Request Cycle Time
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · PR opened → merged · per-PR median · lower = better
metrics.description: Average hours from PR opened to merged. Source not ingested yet — cell shows ComingSoon until Bitbucket PR ingestion lands.

metrics.label: PR Size
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · lines changed per PR · per-PR median · smaller = reviewable

metrics.label: PR Merge Rate
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · Σ merged ÷ Σ created over period · higher = better

metrics.label: Lines / Commit
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · Σ LOC ÷ Σ commits · lower = reviewable

metrics.label: Commits / Active Day
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · Σ commits ÷ days with any commit · cadence

metrics.label: Pull Requests Merged / Developer
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · authored and merged · per developer · period total

metrics.label: Build Success Rate
metrics.sublabel: CI · passed ÷ total runs · target ≥90%

metrics.label: Pull Request Cycle Time
metrics.sublabel: Bitbucket · PR opened → merged · lower = better

metrics.label: Bugs Fixed
metrics.sublabel: Jira · bug-type issues closed · period total
metrics.description: Bug-type Jira issues closed in the selected period. Reflects quality contribution and team reliability.

metrics.label: Median overrun ratio
metrics.sublabel: Jira · actual ÷ estimated · lower = better

metrics.label: Scope Completion Rate
metrics.sublabel: Jira · tasks done ÷ committed at sprint start

metrics.label: Scope Creep Rate
metrics.sublabel: Jira · added mid-sprint ÷ original count · lower = better

metrics.label: On-time Delivery Rate
metrics.sublabel: Jira · closed by due date

metrics.label: Avg Slip When Late
metrics.sublabel: Jira · days past due date · lower = better

metrics.label: AI Code Acceptance
metrics.sublabel: Cursor + Claude Code
metrics.description: Share of authored lines accepted from AI suggestions (Cursor + Claude Code). Reflects how much AI tooling contributes to actual output.

metrics.label: Focus Time
metrics.sublabel: Calendar / M365
metrics.description: Share of work time spent in uninterrupted 60-minute+ blocks. Higher means fewer context switches and more deep work.

metrics.label: Tasks Closed
metrics.sublabel: Jira
metrics.description: Jira tasks moved to Done in the selected period. Direct measure of delivery throughput.

metrics.label: AI Sessions
metrics.sublabel: Cursor
metrics.description: Distinct Cursor sessions in the selected period. Proxy for how often AI tooling is engaged.

metrics.label: Claude Code Cost
metrics.sublabel: Claude Team · usage cost · cents · period total
metrics.description: Per-user-per-day spend in cents from the Claude Team plan. Claude Team is the only per-user cost source in Silver; Enterprise and Admin costs are org-level only.

metrics.label: PRs with Claude Code
metrics.sublabel: Claude Team GitHub-app · PRs with CC attribution · period total
metrics.description: Number of pull requests where Claude Code was active at least once in the measurement window. Populated only on tenants with the Anthropic GitHub-app connected; 0 on orgs without it.

metrics.label: Total PRs (CC window)
metrics.sublabel: Claude Team GitHub-app · total PRs in window · period total
metrics.description: Total pull requests opened in the measurement window — denominator for the prs_with_cc_pct ratio metric. Same availability caveat as prs_with_cc: requires the Anthropic GitHub-app connection.

metrics.label: Messages sent
metrics.sublabel: Chat messages across sources · period total

metrics.label: Channel posts
metrics.sublabel: Channel posts + replies · period total
